description: Equifax ICI Fulfillment Agent - Processes fulfillment requests via REST and MCP interfaces with Google Cloud Datastore persistence and Pub/Sub event publishing

tools.name: create_fulfillment_request
tools.description: Creates a new fulfillment request, validates it, saves to Datastore, and publishes to Pub/Sub

tools.name: save_to_datastore
tools.description: Saves a request entry directly to Google Cloud Datastore

tools.name: read_from_datastore
tools.description: Reads a request entry from Google Cloud Datastore by request ID

tools.name: update_in_datastore
tools.description: Updates an existing request entry in Google Cloud Datastore

tools.name: delete_from_datastore
tools.description: Deletes a request entry from Google Cloud Datastore by request ID

tools.name: publish_to_pubsub
tools.description: Publishes a message to the fulfillment-request-events Pub/Sub topic

agentCard.name: fulfillment-agent
agentCard.description: Handles fulfillment request lifecycle - creation, validation, persistence, and event publishing

skills.name: Create Fulfillment Request
skills.description: Accepts a fulfillment request with customer and product data, validates it, persists to Datastore, and publishes event to Pub/Sub
examples: Create a fulfillment request for customer CUST-001

skills.name: Manage Datastore Entries
skills.description: CRUD operations on fulfillment request entries in Google Cloud Datastore
examples: Update the status of request REQ-12345

skills.name: Publish Fulfillment Events
skills.description: Publishes fulfillment events to Pub/Sub for downstream processing
examples: Publish a fulfillment event for request REQ-12345
